text:
The first scene feels quiet and anticipatory, almost as if I am backstage before a performance, waiting for something to begin. The angled architecture and staged lighting highlight the artificiality of the space—a constructed order that stands in contrast to the unpredictability of life. There’s a gentle tension in the air, an invitation to pause and reflect on what’s about to unfold.

The second scene, saturated with bold colors and the language of research and innovation, evokes curiosity and intellectual excitement. I feel invigorated by the energy of ideas coming to life through display and interaction. Here, humanity and technology intersect, asking me to ponder my relationship with change and knowledge, and my place within a world in constant flux. I feel alive with questions, keenly aware of my capacity for wonder.
